value_hypothesis_if: If we deploy a unified real-time payment processing layer with integrated fraud scoring and automated cross-channel reconciliation
value_hypothesis_then: then Retail Banking will reduce customer payment disputes by 40%, cut reconciliation cycle time to under 4 hours, and enable same-day settlement for 95% of transactions — increasing customer NPS by 15 points and reducing operational cost by £2.4M annually for the Payments & Channels team

outcomes.description: Payment disputes drop from 3.2% to under 2% within 6 months of go-live through real-time fraud scoring
End-of-day reconciliation cycle reduced from 48 hours to under 4 hours via automated cross-channel matching
95% of retail transactions settled same-day, up from 60%, meeting ISO 20022 obligations
Manual reconciliation headcount need reduced by 30%, saving £2.4M annually
Payment-related NPS improves by 15 points driven by fewer disputes and real-time status visibility

open_questions.question: What is the current baseline dispute rate and how is it measured?
open_questions.why: Need baseline to confirm the 40% reduction target is achievable
open_questions.example: e.g. 'Current dispute rate is 3.2% of transactions, measured monthly as (disputes raised / transactions processed). Source: Operations MI report, Jan 2026'
